zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter de Upton於1272年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾武分頓時，他的父親John De Upton53歲，母親Mrs. Elizabeth Upton52歲。他於大約1297年與Avice Kimble在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter de Upton于1272年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾武分頓时，他的父亲John De Upton53岁，母亲Mrs. Elizabeth Upton52岁。他于大约1297年与Avice Kimble在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1329年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Upton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in England called Upton, most of which are named with Old English upp ‘upper’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have different origins, such as one in Essex, originally named with the phrase upp in tūne ‘up in the settlement’, i.e. the higher part of the settlement, and Upton Lovell (Wiltshire), which derives from the Old English personal name Ubba + Old English tūn. This name was brought to Ireland (Antrim) in 1598 by Henry Upton, from Upton in Devon.

variants.name: Uptain
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Upton  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter de Upton was born in 1272, in Uffington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John De Upton, was 53 and his mother, Mrs. Elizabeth Upton, was 52. He married Avice Kimble about 1297, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1329, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter de Upton est né en 1272, à Uffington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Upton, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Elizabeth Upton, avait 52 ans. Il a épousé Avice Kimble environ 1297, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1329, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter de Upton 1272 in Uffington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Upton 53 und seine Mutter Mrs. Elizabeth Upton 52. Er hat um 1297 in Buckinghamshire, England Avice Kimble geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1329 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter de Upton è nato il nel 1272 nel Uffington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John De Upton, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Elizabeth Upton, aveva 52 anni. Lui sposato Avice Kimble circa 1297, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1329, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter de Uptonが1272年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウフィントンで生まれた時，父John De Uptonは53歳，母Mrs. Elizabeth Uptonは52歳であった。約1297年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでAvice Kimbleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1329年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter de Upton(이)가 1272년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 핀그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Upton(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Elizabeth Upton(은)는 52세였다. 그는 대략 1297년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Avice Kimble(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter de Upton nasceu em 1272, em Uffington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Upton, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Elizabeth Upton, tinha 52 anos. Ele casou-se com Avice Kimble aproximadamente 1297, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1329, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter de Upton родился в 1272 г. в местности уффингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John De Upton было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Elizabeth Upton, 52. Он женился на женщине по имени Avice Kimble около 1297 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1329 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter de Upton nació en 1272, en Uffington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John De Upton, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Mrs. Elizabeth Upton, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Avice Kimble aproximadamente 1297, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1329, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
